channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists just turned light into a remote control for crystals
item.description: NYU researchers have found a way to use light to control how microscopic particles assemble into crystals, effectively turning illumination into a too...

item.title: Hidden oceans on icy moons may be boiling beneath the surface
item.description: Icy moons circling the outer planets may be far more dynamic—and explosive—than they appear. New research suggests that when heat from tidal forces me...

item.title: Scientists reveal why a popular anti-aging compound may also fuel cancer
item.description: Polyamines—natural molecules found in every living cell—have become stars in the longevity world for their ability to boost cellular cleanup and suppo...

item.title: Massive asteroid impact 6.3 million years ago left giant glass field in Brazil
item.description: For the first time ever, scientists have uncovered a vast field of tektites in Brazil — mysterious glassy fragments forged when a powerful extraterres...

item.title: Scientists just created chocolate honey packed with surprising health perks
item.description: Scientists in Brazil have transformed cocoa waste into a functional chocolate-infused honey packed with antioxidants and natural stimulants. Using ult...

item.title: NSF-DOE Vera C. Rubin Observatory launches real-time discovery machine for monitoring the night sky
item.description: NSF-DOE Rubin Observatory has issued its first scientific alerts, enabling dynamic, real-time observation of the night sky. The alerts are expected to...

item.title: NSF to proceed with demolition and site restoration at Sacramento Peak Observatory
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation announced today it will proceed with demolition and site restoration at the Sacramento Peak Observatory, also kno...

item.title: NSF launches $100M National Quantum and Nanotechnology Research Infrastructure program
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation is investing up to $100 million to establish a nationwide network of open-access research facilities for quantum ...

item.title: Transitioning NCAR-Wyoming Supercomputing Center operations
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation has informed the NSF National Center for Atmospheric Research (NCAR) that management and operations of the NCAR-W...

item.title: NSF announces first AI-ENGAGE awards to modernize global agriculture
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation, in coordination with partner agencies from Australia, India and Japan, today announced the first cohort of award...
